sections.paragraph:
Original: ספד

Transliteration: sâphad

Phonetic: saw-fad'

BDB Definition:

  1. to wail, lament, mourn
    1. (Qal)
      1. to wail, lament
      2. wailers (participle)
    2. (Niphal) to be lamented, be bewailed

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1530

Part(s) of speech: Verb
